detail.description: Joey Bart homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field. Mike Yastrzemski scores.
Joey Bart singles on a line drive to center fielder TJ Friedl.
Joey Bart singles on a ground ball to left fielder Nathan Church. Konnor Griffin to 2nd.
Joey Bart singles on a fly ball to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Joey Bart doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
Joey Bart singles on a line drive to right fielder James Wood.
Joey Bart homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.

Joey Bart singles on a fly ball to left fielder Heliot Ramos. Spencer Horwitz scores.
Joey Bart singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Konnor Griffin scores.
Pirates challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Joey Bart singles on a ground ball to third baseman Matt Chapman.
Joey Bart homers (2) on a line drive to left center field.
Joey Bart singles on a line drive to left fielder Jorge Barrosa.
Joey Bart homers (3) on a fly ball to left field. Austin Riley scores.
Joey Bart singles on a line drive to left fielder Samad Taylor. Matt Olson to 2nd.

Joey Bart doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Tyrone Taylor. Mike Yastrzemski scores.
